entry.title: [NODUNKS] Which Movie Franchise Should We Cover This Summer?
entry.summary:
We've already watched and reviewed every movie from the 'Fast & Furious' and 'Jurassic Park' franchises. So what's next? On today's No Dunks, the guys take turns pitching the next film series we should cover: 'Indiana Jones', 'Pirates of the Caribbean', 'Superman', or 'Transformers'? Watch/listen to the presentations, weigh the pros and cons, and then cast your vote in our official No Dunks Substack Summer Movie poll ➡️ https://bit.ly/summermoviepoll
✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 🦖 Watch our 'Jurassic Pals' film series: https://bit.ly/3Tn0VyO 🚗 Watch out 'Fast Friends' film series: https://bit.ly/4vzAHGP 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#movies #movie #filmfranchise
entry.content:
We've already watched and reviewed every movie from the 'Fast & Furious' and 'Jurassic Park' franchises. So what's next? On today's No Dunks, the guys take turns pitching the next film series we should cover: 'Indiana Jones', 'Pirates of the Caribbean', 'Superman', or 'Transformers'? Watch/listen to the presentations, weigh the pros and cons, and then cast your vote in our official No Dunks Substack Summer Movie poll ➡️ https://bit.ly/summermoviepoll

✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/
🦖 Watch our 'Jurassic Pals' film series: https://bit.ly/3Tn0VyO
🚗 Watch out 'Fast Friends' film series: https://bit.ly/4vzAHGP

entry.title: [NODUNKS] The NBA has completely botched the Clippers-Kawhi investigation
entry.summary:
The Clippers-Raptors trade centered around Kawhi Leonard will not be completed until the NBA investigation into whether the Clips circumvented the salary cap is completed. No Dunks reacts.
👀 Watch today's entire No Dunks podcast: https://bit.ly/4w344Ta ✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#NBA #KawhiLeonard #investigation
entry.content:
The Clippers-Raptors trade centered around Kawhi Leonard will not be completed until the NBA investigation into whether the Clips circumvented the salary cap is completed. No Dunks reacts.

entry.title: [NODUNKS] Did the Celtics botch things with Jaylen Brown?
entry.summary:
🚨 UPDATE 🚨 The Celtics traded Jaylen Brown to the 76ers for Paul George in a shocking move on Wednesday night! Here's the No Dunks emergency pod ➡️ https://bit.ly/4vJOrzL
It sounds like Jaylen Brown's trade market is not as robust as the Boston Celtics hoped. So now what?

entry.title: [NODUNKS] LeBron James just pulled a Costanza on the Lakers
entry.summary:
LeBron James will return for a 24th NBA season, but it won't be with the Lakers. LeBron has informed L.A. that the franchise can move on without him because he will be playing elsewhere. So where is LeBron going next? No Dunks discuss.
💸 Watch our 2026 NBA Free Agency Special: https://bit.ly/4wapAVA ✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#NBA #LeBronJames #Lakers

LeBron James will return for a 24th NBA season, but it won't be with the Lakers. LeBron has informed L.A. that the franchise can move on without him because he will be playing elsewhere. So where is LeBron going next? No Dunks discuss.

entry.title: [NODUNKS] Raptors bring Kawhi back in shocking trade with Clippers
entry.summary:
Kawhi Leonard has been traded back to the Toronto Raptors in a blockbuster deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. In exchange, the Clippers receive Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, two future first-round picks (2031, 2033), a 2027 first-round pick swap, and two second-round picks. No Dunks debate the risky move and whether this makes the Raps immediate title contenders.
💸 Watch our 2026 NBA Free Agency Special: https://bit.ly/4wapAVA ✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#NBA #Kawhi #Raptors
entry.content:
Kawhi Leonard has been traded back to the Toronto Raptors in a blockbuster deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. In exchange, the Clippers receive Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, two future first-round picks (2031, 2033), a 2027 first-round pick swap, and two second-round picks. No Dunks debate the risky move and whether this makes the Raps immediate title contenders.

💸 Watch our 2026 NBA Free Agency Special: https://bit.ly/4wapAVA
✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/
👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin

entry.title: [NODUNKS] Kawhi Leonard drawing interest from Mavericks and Raptors!?
entry.summary:
LA Clippers All-Star Kawhi Leonard is drawing interest from several teams, including the Dallas Mavericks and Toronto Raptors. No Dunks discuss both potential trade packages, whether it's weird Kawhi could be moved despite the ongoing Aspiration investigation, and how realistic either of these rumors are.
👀 Watch today's entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4vEtHcF ✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#NBA #Kawhi #Raptors
entry.content:
LA Clippers All-Star Kawhi Leonard is drawing interest from several teams, including the Dallas Mavericks and Toronto Raptors. No Dunks discuss both potential trade packages, whether it's weird Kawhi could be moved despite the ongoing Aspiration investigation, and how realistic either of these rumors are.

👀 Watch today's entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4vEtHcF

entry.title: [NODUNKS] Jalen Duren wants HOW much money?
entry.summary:
According to Sam Amick at The Athletic, Jalen Duren is dissatisfied with the Detroit Pistons' initial restricted free agent offer and is preparing to explore sign-and-trade scenarios when permitted Tuesday. Will the Pistons look to move the big man or is this all a negotiation tactic?
✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#NBA #JalenDuren #DetroitPistons

entry.title: [NODUNKS] Who are the top NBA free agents this offseason?
entry.summary:
The 2026 NBA free-agency period begins at the end of June as teams start negotiating with players before official announcements are made July 6. No Dunks take a look at the 12 or so best players (potentially) available on the open market, including restricted free agents, unrestricted free agents, and those with player options and team options.
✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://bit.ly/4qi6nin 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 📸 Follow No Dunks on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodunksinc/
#NBA #NBAFreeAgency #LeBronJames
entry.content:
The 2026 NBA free-agency period begins at the end of June as teams start negotiating with players before official announcements are made July 6. No Dunks take a look at the 12 or so best players (potentially) available on the open market, including restricted free agents, unrestricted free agents, and those with player options and team options.

✍️ No Dunks' Substack has ad-free episodes: https://nodunks.substack.com/

entry.title: [NODUNKS] What's really going on with these Giannis-Celtics trade rumors?
entry.summary:
According to The Ringer's Bill Simmons, the Boston Celtics reportedly made an offer to the Milwaukee Bucks for Giannis Antetokounmpo last week. No Dunks discuss what's going on here and whether this all just a ploy by the Bucks to put more pressure on the Miami Heat trade package.
👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4xMxIgL 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc
#NBA #Giannis #Celtics
entry.content:
According to The Ringer's Bill Simmons, the Boston Celtics reportedly made an offer to the Milwaukee Bucks for Giannis Antetokounmpo last week. No Dunks discuss what's going on here and whether this all just a ploy by the Bucks to put more pressure on the Miami Heat trade package.

👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4xMxIgL
👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com
📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc
𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc

entry.title: [NODUNKS] You can buy Taylor Swift's Cavs courtside chair at auction
entry.summary:
Sports and entertainment memorabilia marketplace The Realest is auctioning off a courtside chair that Taylor Swift used while attending Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Finals between the Cavaliers and Knicks in Cleveland. Swift attended the game alongside her fiancé, Travis Kelce. who is a Cleveland Heights native and tight end for the Kansas City Chiefs.
👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4ojgVgH 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc
#NBA #TaylorSwift #Swifties
entry.content:
Sports and entertainment memorabilia marketplace The Realest is auctioning off a courtside chair that Taylor Swift used while attending Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Finals between the Cavaliers and Knicks in Cleveland. Swift attended the game alongside her fiancé, Travis Kelce. who is a Cleveland Heights native and tight end for the Kansas City Chiefs.

👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4ojgVgH
👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com
📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc

entry.title: [NODUNKS] No Dunks plays the new 82-0.com game
entry.summary:
The objective of 82-0 is to construct a historical NBA roster capable of achieving a perfect undefeated season. Your success is determined by a non-linear simulation engine that evaluates the raw statistical output of five selected legends against a full 82-game schedule. Can you go 82-0? Play here: https://www.82-0.com/
👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4e46HvQ 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 🎨 LeBron jersey edits via Basketball Forever: https://www.instagram.com/basketballforever/
#NBA #game #games
entry.content:
The objective of 82-0 is to construct a historical NBA roster capable of achieving a perfect undefeated season. Your success is determined by a non-linear simulation engine that evaluates the raw statistical output of five selected legends against a full 82-game schedule. Can you go 82-0? Play here: https://www.82-0.com/

👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4e46HvQ
👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com
📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc

entry.title: [NODUNKS] The choice for LeBron James' next team is obvious
entry.summary:
No Dunks fan Bogge writes in: "If NEXT season is LeBron James' last, and he doesn't re-sign with the Lakers, what team would you most like to see him join? Disregard cap space and realism; fantasize freely."
👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4wNEZfM 👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com 📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc 𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc 🎨 LeBron jersey edits via Basketball Forever: https://www.instagram.com/basketballforever/
#NBA #LeBron #LeBronJames
entry.content:
No Dunks fan Bogge writes in: "If NEXT season is LeBron James' last, and he doesn't re-sign with the Lakers, what team would you most like to see him join? Disregard cap space and realism; fantasize freely."

👀 Watch this entire No Dunks episode: https://bit.ly/4wNEZfM
👕 Fix up, look sharp in No Dunks merch: https://nodunks.com
📈 Subscribe to No Dunks on YouTube: YouTube.com/nodunksinc
𝕏 Follow No Dunks on Twitter/X: https://x.com/NoDunksInc
🎨 LeBron jersey edits via Basketball Forever: https://www.instagram.com/basketballforever/

#NBA #LeBron #LeBronJames

entry.title: [NODUNKS] What to expect in Knicks-Cavs ECF series
entry.summary:
The No Dunks crew preview and predict the Eastern Conference Finals series between the No. 3 seeded New York Knicks and the No. 4 seeded Cleveland Cavaliers. What are things to watch for? X-factors? Who wins? Leave your thoughts and predictions in the comments.
